title: White Liquid Superglue, 10 grams (Pack of 2) - Fast Acting, Perfect for Small Household Repairs on Metal, Pottery, Wood, & More
features: DOUBLE UP ON REPAIRS: This package includes not one, but two 10g tubes of our high-strength white liquid superglue, ensuring you're well-prepared for any unexpected repair needs that pop up around your home or workshop.

QUICK ACTION BONDING: Our superglue is formulated for fast action, setting in just a matter of seconds. Less waiting means more time enjoying your repaired items, from cherished ceramics to essential everyday tools.
EASY TO USE: Each tube’s precision applicator allows for a smooth, controlled flow of glue, ensuring accurate application without drips or mess. Perfect for delicate repairs where precision is key.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: Whether it's metal, pottery, wood, or more, our white liquid superglue is your go-to solution. Its wide-ranging compatibility makes it perfect for fixing everything from broken jewelry to detached wooden furniture parts.

IDEAL FOR HOUSEHOLD REPAIRS: Designed specifically with small household repairs in mind, our superglue is the handy companion you need for those quick fix-ups, saving you time and money on professional repairs.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of fast-acting Super Glue contains two individual 10g tubes of adhesive that are perfect for bonding materials such as metal, pottery, wood, and many more. Safety Warning No warning applicable
